page_content:
CHBE440 Chemical Kinetics and Reactor Design (3 Credits) Fundamentals of chemical reaction kinetics and their application to the design and operation of chemical reactors. Reaction rate theory, homogeneous reactions and catalysis electrochemical reactions. Catalytic reactor design. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in CHBE301, MATH241, and MATH246. Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Chemical program; and permission of ENGR-Chemical & Biomolecular Engineering department. Credit Only Granted for: CHBE440 or ENCH440. Formerly: ENCH440.

CHBE442 Chemical and Biomolecular Systems Analysis (3 Credits) Dynamic response applied to process systems. Goals and modes of control, Laplace transformations, analysis and synthesis of simple control systems, closed loop response, dynamic testing. Prerequisite: CHBE424 and CHBE426. Credit Only Granted for: CHBE442 or ENCH442. Formerly: ENCH442.
